subcodes.first_line: The verses have indeed been sent down and the signs have appeared, yet the people remain behind a manifest veil. O servants of the All-Merciful! By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهرت العلامات و القوم فی حجاب مبین یا عباد الرحمن تالله قد
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
